---
title: "Variant reference build status report"
subtitle: "Preprocessing variant_references first-pass diagnostics"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
execute:
  echo: true
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{r setup}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(DT)

repo_root <- tryCatch(
  system2("git", c("rev-parse", "--show-toplevel"), stdout = TRUE, stderr = FALSE),
  error = function(e) getwd()
)
repo_root <- normalizePath(repo_root[1], mustWork = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = repo_root)

final_manifest <- "references/variant_calling/variant_calling_reference_manifest.tsv"
shard_dir <- "references/variant_calling/manifest_shards"

read_manifest_safely <- function(path) {
  readr::read_tsv(path, show_col_types = FALSE, col_types = readr::cols(.default = readr::col_character()))
}

empty_manifest <- function() {
  tibble(
    target_species = character(),
    REF_TYPE = character(),
    MaskPriority = character(),
    wg_fasta_source = character(),
    chrM_fasta_source = character(),
    numt_mask_bed = character(),
    numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref = character(),
    whole_fasta = character(),
    chrM_fasta = character(),
    chrM_shift_fasta = character(),
    build_status = character(),
    build_message = character()
  )
}

ensure_columns <- function(x, cols) {
  for (nm in cols) {
    if (!nm %in% names(x)) x[[nm]] <- NA_character_
  }
  x
}

required_report_cols <- names(empty_manifest())

load_variant_manifest <- function() {
  if (file.exists(final_manifest) && file.info(final_manifest)$size > 0) {
    dat <- read_manifest_safely(final_manifest) %>% ensure_columns(required_report_cols)
    return(list(
      manifest = dat,
      source = "final_manifest",
      source_paths = final_manifest,
      shard_files_seen = NA_integer_,
      shard_files_read = NA_integer_,
      shard_empty_files = NA_integer_,
      shard_missing_files = NA_integer_
    ))
  }

  shard_files <- if (dir.exists(shard_dir)) {
    list.files(shard_dir, pattern = "\\.tsv$", full.names = TRUE)
  } else {
    character()
  }

  if (length(shard_files) == 0) {
    stop(
      "No variant reference manifest was found. Expected either '", final_manifest,
      "' or one or more TSV shards under '", shard_dir, "'.",
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  shard_info <- tibble(
    path = shard_files,
    size = file.info(shard_files)$size,
    shard_id = stringr::str_extract(basename(path), "\\d+") %>% as.integer()
  )

  readable_shards <- shard_info %>% filter(!is.na(size), size > 0)
  if (nrow(readable_shards) == 0) {
    stop("Manifest shard files were found, but all were empty under '", shard_dir, "'.", call. = FALSE)
  }

  dat <- purrr::map_dfr(
    readable_shards$path,
    ~ read_manifest_safely(.x) %>% mutate(.source_shard = .x)
  ) %>% ensure_columns(c(required_report_cols, ".source_shard"))

  shard_ids <- shard_info$shard_id[!is.na(shard_info$shard_id)]
  missing_shards <- if (length(shard_ids) > 1) {
    length(setdiff(seq(min(shard_ids), max(shard_ids)), shard_ids))
  } else {
    NA_integer_
  }

  list(
    manifest = dat,
    source = "manifest_shards",
    source_paths = readable_shards$path,
    shard_files_seen = nrow(shard_info),
    shard_files_read = nrow(readable_shards),
    shard_empty_files = sum(is.na(shard_info$size) | shard_info$size == 0),
    shard_missing_files = missing_shards
  )
}

manifest_bundle <- load_variant_manifest()
manifest_raw <- manifest_bundle$manifest

manifest <- manifest_raw %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(required_report_cols), ~ replace_na(as.character(.x), "")),
    build_status_norm = if_else(str_to_lower(build_status) == "success", "success", "failed"),
    numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref = if_else(numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref == "", "unknown", numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref),
    failure_category = case_when(
      build_status_norm == "success" ~ "success",
      str_detect(build_message, fixed("SIGKILL", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "bwa_SIGKILL",
      str_detect(build_message, fixed("Is a directory", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "path_is_directory",
      str_detect(build_message, fixed("missing_wg_fasta", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "missing_wg_fasta",
      str_detect(build_message, fixed("missing_chrM_fasta", ignore_case = TRUE)) ~ "missing_chrM_fasta",
      TRUE ~ "other_failed"
    )
  )

success_rows <- manifest %>% filter(build_status_norm == "success")
failed_rows <- manifest %>% filter(build_status_norm != "success")
```

# Overview

```{r overview}
overview_tbl <- tibble(
  metric = c(
    "manifest_source",
    "source_paths_read",
    "total_rows_observed",
    "success_rows",
    "failed_rows",
    "shard_files_seen",
    "shard_files_read",
    "empty_shard_files_detected",
    "missing_shard_files_detected"
  ),
  value = c(
    manifest_bundle$source,
    paste(manifest_bundle$source_paths, collapse = "; "),
    nrow(manifest),
    nrow(success_rows),
    nrow(failed_rows),
    manifest_bundle$shard_files_seen,
    manifest_bundle$shard_files_read,
    manifest_bundle$shard_empty_files,
    manifest_bundle$shard_missing_files
  )
)
knitr::kable(overview_tbl)
```

# Build status summary

```{r build-status-tables}
build_status_counts <- manifest %>% count(build_status, sort = TRUE, name = "n")
knitr::kable(build_status_counts)

ref_type_by_status <- manifest %>% count(REF_TYPE, build_status, sort = TRUE, name = "n")
knitr::kable(ref_type_by_status)
```

```{r build-status-plot, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
ggplot(manifest, aes(x = REF_TYPE, fill = build_status)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(x = "REF_TYPE", y = "Reference count", fill = "build_status") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
```

# Failure diagnostics

```{r failure-diagnostics}
failure_category_counts <- manifest %>% count(failure_category, sort = TRUE, name = "n")
knitr::kable(failure_category_counts)

failed_detail <- failed_rows %>%
  select(target_species, REF_TYPE, MaskPriority, wg_fasta_source, chrM_fasta_source, build_message)

DT::datatable(
  failed_detail,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE),
  rownames = FALSE
)
```

# Masking summary

```{r masking-summary}
masking_all <- manifest %>%
  count(REF_TYPE, MaskPriority, numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(REF_TYPE, MaskPriority, numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref)
knitr::kable(masking_all)

masking_success <- success_rows %>%
  count(REF_TYPE, numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref, name = "n") %>%
  arrange(REF_TYPE, numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref)
knitr::kable(masking_success)
```

```{r masking-plot, fig.width=9, fig.height=5}
ggplot(success_rows, aes(x = REF_TYPE, fill = numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref)) +
  geom_bar() +
  labs(x = "REF_TYPE", y = "Successful reference count", fill = "NUMT mask applied") +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 1))
```

# `#A` masking diagnostic

```{r a-diagnostic}
resolve_repo_path <- function(path) {
  if (is.na(path) || path == "") return(NA_character_)
  if (grepl("^/", path)) path else file.path(repo_root, path)
}

count_bed_intervals <- function(path) {
  resolved <- resolve_repo_path(path)
  if (is.na(resolved) || !file.exists(resolved) || file.info(resolved)$size == 0) return(0L)
  lines <- readLines(resolved, warn = FALSE)
  sum(lines != "" & !str_starts(lines, "#"))
}

bed_size <- function(path) {
  resolved <- resolve_repo_path(path)
  if (is.na(resolved) || !file.exists(resolved)) return(NA_real_)
  as.numeric(file.info(resolved)$size)
}

a_rows <- manifest %>%
  filter(REF_TYPE == "#A") %>%
  mutate(
    bed_path_nonempty = numt_mask_bed != "",
    bed_exists = map_lgl(numt_mask_bed, ~ {
      resolved <- resolve_repo_path(.x)
      !is.na(resolved) && file.exists(resolved)
    }),
    bed_size_bytes = map_dbl(numt_mask_bed, bed_size),
    bed_n_intervals = map_int(numt_mask_bed, count_bed_intervals)
  )

a_display <- a_rows %>%
  select(
    target_species, MaskPriority, numt_mask_bed, numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref,
    build_status, build_message, bed_exists, bed_size_bytes, bed_n_intervals
  )

DT::datatable(
  a_display,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(pageLength = 25, scrollX = TRUE),
  rownames = FALSE
)

a_summary <- tibble(
  metric = c(
    "#A total",
    "#A success",
    "#A failed",
    "#A success with mask yes",
    "#A success with mask no and non-empty BED",
    "#A success with mask no and empty/missing BED"
  ),
  value = c(
    nrow(a_rows),
    sum(a_rows$build_status_norm == "success"),
    sum(a_rows$build_status_norm != "success"),
    sum(a_rows$build_status_norm == "success" & a_rows$numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref == "yes"),
    sum(a_rows$build_status_norm == "success" & a_rows$numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref == "no" & a_rows$bed_n_intervals > 0),
    sum(a_rows$build_status_norm == "success" & a_rows$numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref == "no" & (a_rows$bed_n_intervals == 0 | !a_rows$bed_exists))
  )
)
knitr::kable(a_summary)

problem_a <- a_rows %>%
  filter(build_status_norm == "success", numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref == "no", bed_n_intervals > 0)

if (nrow(problem_a) > 0) {
  cat(
    "\n::: {.callout-warning}\n",
    "## Possible #A NUMT masking propagation issue\n\n",
    "There are ", nrow(problem_a),
    " successful #A rows with a non-empty BED file but `numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref == \"no\"`. ",
    "This suggests `mask_ref_types` was not propagated correctly or the build logic did not apply the BED.\n",
    ":::\n",
    sep = ""
  )
}
```

# Recommended test references

```{r recommended-test-references}
pick_references <- function(data, ref_type, n = 5, mask_yes = NULL, priority_regex = NULL) {
  x <- data %>% filter(REF_TYPE == ref_type)
  if (!is.null(mask_yes)) x <- x %>% filter(numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref == mask_yes)
  x %>%
    mutate(
      priority_rank = if (!is.null(priority_regex)) if_else(str_detect(MaskPriority, priority_regex), 0L, 1L) else 1L,
      bed_rank = if_else(numt_mask_bed != "", 0L, 1L)
    ) %>%
    arrange(priority_rank, bed_rank, target_species) %>%
    slice_head(n = n)
}

recommended <- bind_rows(
  pick_references(success_rows, "#A", n = 6, priority_regex = "A_FINAL_minimal_non_chrM_mask"),
  pick_references(success_rows, "#C-likely_comp", n = 6, mask_yes = "yes"),
  pick_references(success_rows, "#C-Ambiguous", n = 6)
) %>%
  distinct(target_species, REF_TYPE, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
  select(target_species, REF_TYPE, MaskPriority, numt_mask_applied_to_whole_ref, whole_fasta, chrM_fasta, chrM_shift_fasta)

DT::datatable(
  recommended,
  filter = "top",
  options = list(pageLength = 20, scrollX = TRUE),
  rownames = FALSE
)
```

# Session info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
